creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 147544
libsearpc.shar

- This needs USES=python:2 and lib/python2.7/site-packages in the pkg-plist needs to be %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%
- All the autotools stuff should be replaced with USES=autoreconf
- The patch-Makefile.am is wrong.  The substitution should be "s|(DESTDIR)||g" because we want the first line of libsearpc.pc to only contain the PREFIX one time
- pkg-descr should be run through fmt(1)

I've made these changes and attached a new shar for you to review.
